hero.title: Automate your business
hero.subtitle: Integration, development, and automation of business processes. I help companies increase efficiency through CRM, ERP, and custom solutions.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Full range of Bitrix24 services — from consultation to implementation and support

items.title: Bitrix24 Integration
items.description: Setup and configuration of Bitrix24 CRM, tasks, document flow, and automation from scratch, tailored to your business.

items.title: Custom Development
items.description: Development of custom applications, REST API integrations, widgets, and extensions for Bitrix24 and Bitrix Framework.

items.title: Process Automation
items.description: Automation of sales, marketing, and management processes using robots, business processes, and triggers.

items.title: System Integration
items.description: Integration of Bitrix24 with 1C, IP telephony, payment systems, marketplaces, and other external services via REST API.

items.title: Consulting & Training
items.description: Team training, development of work regulations, and consulting on effective use of the platform.

items.title: Support & Maintenance
items.description: Technical support, monitoring, updates, and scaling of your Bitrix24 solution after launch.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Experience and expertise in the Bitrix24 ecosystem
about.description: I am a Bitrix24 developer and integrator with over 5 years of experience in implementing projects for small and medium-sized businesses. I specialize in complex automation, CRM system development, and integration with external systems.

items.title: CRM for a Real Estate Agency
items.description: Full CRM cycle implementation: lead management, deal automation, integration with IP telephony and email. Sales cycle reduced by 40%.

items.title: Integration with 1C for Wholesale Company
items.description: Two-way real-time synchronization of product catalog, counterparties, orders, and payments between Bitrix24 and 1C:Enterprise.

items.title: Process Automation for a Production Company
items.description: Development of a multi-stage approval system, automatic task creation, and KPI monitoring dashboard for 200+ employees.

items.title: Portal for a Service Company
items.description: Corporate portal with document management, employee self-service, automated reporting, and integration with accounting systems.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.subtitle: Let's discuss your project
contacts.description: Ready to help with Bitrix24 integration and automation. Write to me in any convenient messenger — I'll respond within an hour.
